headline: American Water Works Stock: Is AWK Underperforming the Utilities Sector?
summary: American Water Works has underperformed the Utilities sector over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

raw.headline: American Water Works Stock: Is AWK Underperforming the Utilities Sector?

headline: Red-Tail Land Conservancy Receives $75,000 Grant from the American Water Charitable Foundation to Protect Boston Creek Forest in Wayne County
summary: Red-Tail Land Conservancy, based in Muncie, Indiana, announced today it has been awarded a $75,000 Water and Environment grant from the American Water Charitable Foundation, supporting the acquisition and permanent protection of 39 acres of mature woodland along Boston Creek in Wayne County, just south of Richmond.
